summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of SIGMA asset tracking app. 27/27 pytest backend cases pass covering auth, CRUD (offices/rooms/assets), move validations (office/room not found, room-office mismatch, asset 404, same-location 422, notes>500 422), valid-move persistence with denormalized log names, history filters (office_id, date_from/date_to, pagination), stats, and unauth 401. UI smoke through Playwright: login (wrong+correct), dashboard stats/search/office-filter, asset create/delete with confirm dialog, asset detail with move flow + confirm dialog + timeline refresh, current-position card w/ POSISI SEKARANG, offices CRUD, rooms page, logout, and unauth redirect from / to /login. Business-critical history preservation on office deletion verified end-to-end.

minor.issue: server.py sets allow_credentials=True AND allow_origins=['*'] (wildcard). Browsers normally reject credentialed requests to '*'. It currently works because REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is same-origin via ingress, but if a different origin is ever used, cookies will silently be dropped. Recommend setting CORS_ORIGINS to the explicit frontend origin.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Tighten CORS_ORIGINS in backend/.env from '*' to the explicit preview URL to align with allow_credentials=True.
critical_code_review_comments: core.py: bcrypt hashing OK ($2b$), JWT secret from env, cookies httpOnly+secure+samesite=none — matches auth playbook.
seed.py seed_admin is idempotent and updates password_hash if it changes — good.

services.py AssetService.move: correctly denormalizes from/to office+room NAMES into asset_logs so history survives office/room deletion. OfficeService.delete cascades: unsets assets, deletes rooms, deletes office — logs preserved. Verified in tests.

history() query: date_to filter appends 'T23:59:59.999999+00:00' to date_to. This assumes moved_at is stored as ISO string with +00:00 offset — works because now_iso() produces that format. Any future refactor to naive datetime would silently break the filter — consider using MongoDB $lt on next-day boundary instead.
No brute-force lockout implemented on /auth/login (playbook mentions 5-fail lockout). Not requested in feature list but worth noting.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True is technically an invalid combo per spec (see minor issue).
AssetService.move rollback on repo.update failure deletes the log — good defensive pattern; still not atomic (no transaction), but acceptable for this scale.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed offices/rooms/assets during pytest runs. Cleaned residual UI_TEST_Office at end. AST-005 was moved during testing (log added). Seed office 'Kantor Pusat Jakarta' not deleted per request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 27 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass. Use them as regression baseline. Every test cleans up its own TEST_/UI_TEST_ resources. Playwright verified UI selectors: login-email/password/submit, dashboard-page, stat-total_assets, asset-search-input, asset-office-filter, add-asset-button, asset-kode/nama-input, asset-form-submit, asset-row-{KODE}, asset-delete-{KODE}, asset-detail-page, move-office-select, move-room-select, move-notes-textarea, move-asset-submit-button, confirm-dialog(-confirm/-cancel), history-timeline, current-position-card, timeline-item-{i}, history-date-from/to, history-office-filter, add-office-button, office-name-input, office-form-submit, add-room-button, logout-button, select-option-{id}. All present and functional.
